query: SELECT a.id, a.userId, u.email, a.drillId, a.drillName, a.status, a.assignedAt FROM drillAssignments a JOIN users u ON a.userId = u.id WHERE u.email = 'info@stevenlewisrealestate.com' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute SELECT a.id, a.userId, u.email, a.drillId, a.drillName, a.status, a.assignedAt FROM drillAssignments a JOIN users u ON a.userId = u.id WHERE u.email = 'info@stevenlewisrealestate.com' LIMIT 10;
